route_summary: Spice Garden to MG Road by cab via Old Airport Road, Domlur, and Indiranagar.
Walk or auto to Indiranagar Metro, take Purple Line to MG Road, then walk the last kilometre.
Purple Line metro from Whitefield side toward MG Road with short last-mile walk.
Cab from HSR Layout to MG Road with risk around Silk Board, Koramangala, and Richmond Road.
